candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow ending balance for CHE.

candidates.why: Flow, not stock.

Component of current liabilities, not total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings excluding financial lease
candidates.why: Best current debt line; explicitly interest-bearing and excludes financial lease, matching baseline STD definition.
Interest payable is not principal debt and should be excluded from STD.
Current debt-like item but leases are excluded from baseline STD.
Current liability but not debt financing.
Operating liability, not debt financing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings excluding financial lease

variables.notes: Chosen outside the STD shortlist because it is the clean current interest-bearing debt line and explicitly excludes lease, which is preferred under the STD rule.
